import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Log in with email and password"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/auth/login"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a session token (JWT) valid for 30 days — the credential the
official apps use. For long-lived integrations prefer a
[personal access token](/developers/api#personal-access-tokens-recommended):
session tokens expire and are all invalidated when you change your
password.

Rate-limited to 10 attempts per 15 minutes per IP.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

</ParamsDetails>

>
  
</RequestSchema>
